info.name: Fitscale Backend API
info.description:
API collection for the Fitscale backend.

## Auth
- Uses httpOnly cookies (`accessToken`, `refreshToken`). Log in first; Postman sends cookies automatically on later requests to the same host.
- Tokens are **not** returned in the JSON body — only a sanitized user object (`passwordHash` and `token` are omitted).
- Refresh and logout identify the user from the `refreshToken` cookie — no email in the request body.
- Cookies use `Secure` only when `NODE_ENV=production`.

## Protected routes
- `/api/users` and `/api/workouts` require a valid `accessToken` cookie.

## User roles
- `ADMIN` — list/create/delete all users
- Owner or `ADMIN` — get/update/delete a user by `:id`
- Any authenticated user — own workouts only

## Validation
- Register/create password: min 8 characters
- User `:id` must be a UUID
- Workout `workoutType`: PUSHUP | SQUAT | SITUP | PLANK
- Workout `count`: positive integer

request.description:
Health check.

**Response 200:** `{ success: true, message: "Backend running" }`

item.name: Auth
item.description: Public auth routes. Login and refresh set httpOnly cookies.

request.description:
Registers a new user (role defaults to USER).

**Body:** `{ email, password }` — password min 8 chars

**Response 201:** `{ user, success, message }` — user is sanitized (no passwordHash/token)

**Response 400:** validation or duplicate email error

Logs in a user.

**Body:** `{ email, password }`

**Sets cookies:** `accessToken` (1h), `refreshToken` (7d)

**Response 200:** `{ user, success, message }` — no tokens in body

**Response 401:** invalid credentials

Issues new tokens using the `refreshToken` cookie. No request body.

**Requires:** valid `refreshToken` cookie (from Login)

**Sets cookies:** new `accessToken` and `refreshToken`

**Response 200:** `{ user, success, message }`

**Response 401:** missing, invalid, or revoked refresh token

Logs out the current user.

**Requires:** valid `refreshToken` cookie

**Clears cookies:** `accessToken`, `refreshToken`

**Invalidates** stored refresh token in DB

**Response 200:** `{ success, message }`

**Response 401:** missing or invalid refresh token

item.name: Users
item.description:
Protected routes. Require `accessToken` cookie.

- Admin only: list all, create, delete all
- Owner or admin: get/update/delete by `:id`

request.description:
Creates a user. **Admin only.**

**Body:** `{ email, password, role? }` — role: ADMIN | TRAINER | USER (defaults to USER)

**Response 201:** `{ user, success, message }`

Returns all users ordered by `createdAt` desc. **Admin only.**

**Response 200:** `{ users, success, message }` — users are sanitized

Returns a single user. **Owner or admin.**

**Params:** `id` — UUID

**Response 200:** `{ user, success, message }`

**Response 403:** not owner and not admin

**Response 404:** user not found

Updates a user. **Owner or admin.** All body fields are optional.

**Body:** `{ email?, password?, role? }` — password min 8 chars if provided

**Response 200:** `{ user, success, message }`

**Response 403:** not owner and not admin

Deletes a user. **Owner or admin.**

**Params:** `id` — UUID

**Response 200:** `{ success, message }`

**Response 403:** not owner and not admin

Deletes all users. **Admin only.**

**Response 200:** `{ success, message }`

item.name: Workouts
item.description: Protected routes. Require `accessToken` cookie. Workouts are scoped to the authenticated user.

request.description:
Creates a workout for the authenticated user.

**Body:** `{ workoutType, count }`
- `workoutType`: PUSHUP | SQUAT | SITUP | PLANK
- `count`: positive integer

**Response 201:** `{ workout, success, message }`

Returns workouts for the authenticated user, ordered by `createdAt` desc.

**Response 200:** `{ workouts, success, message }`
